content.en:
The meeting chose the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, after all, this is the most important forbidden realm in the Daoshan Realm.

And the location they chose was in an attic in the Forbidden Void Realm where the Battle Realm Tower was located, and one after another top domain ancestors arrived.

Soon, Ye Tian also came.

As time passed, almost all of the top domain ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm were present.

Ye Tian observed, and a total of 226 top domain ancestors came here.

The number of such top domain ancestors was much more than the top domain ancestors on the surface of the Divine Heaven Realm, and it was obvious that there were many ancient top domain ancestors among them.

Of course, this was definitely not all the top domain ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm.

I am afraid that there are still many top domain ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm who have entered the Dark Forbidden Domain, and they have been looking for opportunities for a long time, some have died, and some have been lost, unable to find their way back to the Divine Heaven Realm.

However, they are now the domain ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm, and they can be regarded as the top domain ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm today.

Ye Tian glanced at it, and he could roughly see the status of these top domain ancestors.

Among them, the most powerful should be these six top domain ancestors.

Feather Domain Ancestor, Golden Ding Domain Ancestor, Wind Eye Domain Ancestor, Time Domain Ancestor, Ten Thousand Worlds Domain Ancestor, and Destruction Domain Ancestor.

Their strength surpassed that of the top ten overlords of the original Divine Heaven Realm, and no one knew what their strength was.

But these ten top domain ancestors all had a chance, and they all practiced the holy body one by one, and all of them had cultivated one or more domain techniques to the extreme realm, so their combat power was very strong, very close to the weaker supreme domain ancestors.

Before breaking through to the Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian's strength should be on par with them, and unless he used the Forbidden Yuan Blade, he couldn't kill them at all.

At this time, many top domain ancestors arrived, and the meeting began.

The first to speak was the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor.

The strength of the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Worlds Domain is very strong, vaguely known as the number one powerhouse in the Divine Heaven Realm, and it is rumored that he has ten thousand worlds in his body and can mobilize the power of ten thousand worlds.

Of course, this is a cultivation system that he has figured out by himself, and it is very imperfect, and it is difficult to break through to the level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, but it can make his strength extremely strong.

The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realms Domain said: "The purpose of opening this meeting today is very simple, everyone has come to the Daoshan Realm, and they can be regarded as a part of the Daoshan Realm, although the Daoshan Realm is smaller than the Divine Heaven Realm, the territory is still very large, such a large territory, it should be redivided!"

"Yes, we do need to divide the territory, otherwise, it will not be good to have a conflict with each other!"

"In addition, some of the territory of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm should also be given to us, those weak sects occupy so much territory, it's just unlikely!"

"That's right, the territory of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm also needs to be redivided!"

Many top domain ancestors have agreed to divide the territory of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

Strictly speaking, the territory of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm is highly valuable, and the value of any continent is higher than the value of a territory in the Daoshan Realm.

It's just that they settled in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm too late, so the territory of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm has long been divided.

Therefore, if they want to occupy those territories, they must destroy or subdue those forces.

But in this way, it will inevitably break the pattern of the Xuanxuan taboo world.

Of course, there are no strong people in the Xuanxu Taboo Realm, and the most powerful force in the Xuanxu Taboo Realm is currently the Black Wind Mountain, but the Black Wind Mountain is only a few elite domain ancestors, and the strongest is undoubtedly Ye Tian.

Because of this, they invited Ye Tian, and most of what they just said was for Ye Tian.

As long as Ye Tian agreed, they would immediately attack those forces in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, thus occupying the territory of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

At this time, many top domain ancestors looked at Ye Tian intentionally or unintentionally, waiting for Ye Tian's reply.

If Ye Tian had been silent, they would have acquiesced.

"If you want to carve up the territory of the Daoshan Realm, as long as it doesn't involve the territory of the Terrans, I won't care. But you want to carve up the territory of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, I'm sorry, I don't agree!" Ye Tian finally spoke.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, what do you mean by this?"

Destruction Domain Ancestor said coldly.

"That's what the words mean, you are not qualified to divide the territory of the Xuanxuan Forbidden Realm. To put it mildly, you are all outsiders, and many of the territories of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm currently belong to our Terrans, and some other forces in the territory are basically loyal to the Black Wind Mountain or the Terrans, and if you want to carve up the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, it is tantamount to provoking me!"

Ye Tian's voice was also cold.

When the Heavenly Emperor Palace was still there, Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace occupied the most territory, and some other Upper Triple Heavenly Sects occupied other territories.

But with the destruction of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, Black Wind Mountain was dominant, and many forces surrendered to Black Wind Mountain.

And the Terran Race is also getting stronger and stronger, giving birth to a large number of half-step domain ancestors, as well as some domain ancestors, and there are many forces that are subservient to the Terran alone.

Moreover, the speed of human reproduction is very fast, and the human world has long been insufficient.

Nowadays, the clansmen of the Terrans are all over the Void Forbidden Realm, and many territories are actually controlled by the Terrans.

Therefore, Ye Tian would not agree to the plans of the top domain ancestors who wanted to occupy the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

As for the territories outside the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, although those territories were large, they didn't have many resources, so he wouldn't care too much.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, you alone want to occupy such a large territory as the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, you must be too greedy!" Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor said coldly: "I heard that your strength is very strong, and you killed the top domain ancestor when you returned to the One Realm, I don't know how you did it, what means you relied on, but even if you are promoted to the level of the Domain Ancestor now, no matter how strong your strength is, I am afraid it will be difficult to compete with the strongest domain ancestor, at most it can be called the top top domain ancestor combat power." And we have a few people here with such combat power, and you alone can't compete with us!"

Bang!!!!

Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor, Time Domain Ancestor, Destruction Domain Ancestor, and Golden Ding Domain Ancestor, the aura of these four top domain ancestors burst out and locked Ye Tian.

It seems that he is ready to make a move on Ye Tian at any time to threaten Ye Tian.

"You're going to do it to me?"

Ye Tian asked with a smile.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, if you agree, we won't do it, otherwise you understand!"

The Ten Thousand Realms Ancestor threatened.

"You've seen too little!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Just when everyone was puzzled, Ye Tian made a move.

"Five Elements Ban!"

As soon as this holy technique came out, this void was completely blocked.

And Ye Tian stood up, and the aura all over his body shocked all the top domain ancestors.
